About Me

Building software that matters

I'm Meghana Mamilla — a software engineer and MSc Computer Science student at York St John University in London. With real-world experience at Sparity (Hyderabad, Fintech), I've shipped production REST APIs, designed relational databases, and built Angular SPAs for financial workflows used by real end users.

I thrive at the intersection of frontend and backend — equally comfortable designing a clean, responsive UI with Angular Material and reactive forms, as I am architecting a layered .NET API with Entity Framework, LINQ, and JWT authentication. I care deeply about clean architecture, performance, and code that teammates actually enjoy reading.

💡 What sets me apart: Full-chain experience — from database schema design and REST API architecture in ASP.NET Core, to reactive Angular frontends with NgRx state management and Chart.js dashboards. I've worked Agile in a real team, and I bring that production mindset to every project.
Core Stack
Angular 15/16 TypeScript NgRx ASP.NET Core Entity Framework LINQ SQL Server MySQL Spring Boot Kafka Azure AWS

Projects

Things I've built

The two projects that best showcase my full-stack capabilities.

⭐ Featured Full Stack · Fintech
🏦
⟨/⟩ ↗
SLMS — Savings & Loan Management API
Built: Enterprise REST API powering a cooperative society's full loan lifecycle — from member onboarding to EMI processing.
Why it matters: Replaced manual spreadsheet tracking, cutting reconciliation errors by ~40% and enabling real-time loan dashboards for admins.
JWT token authentication with custom TokenAuthorization attribute
Full CRUD for Members, Loans, Deposits, Departments, Share Capital
EMI transaction processing & loan pre-close workflows
Dashboard analytics API + SMTP email notification service
Swagger/OpenAPI docs · EF Core migrations · N-tier architecture
ASP.NET Core C# Entity Framework SQL Server JWT AutoMapper Swagger
↓ 40% reconciliation errors N-tier architecture Production-ready
⭐ Featured Angular SPA · Dashboard
📊
⟨/⟩ ↗
Project Management Dashboard
Built: Full-stack Angular 16 SPA with Chart.js analytics, JWT auth, and a .NET REST API backend for real-time project tracking.
Why it matters: Consolidated project status across teams into a single dashboard, reducing status-update meetings by ~30%.
Role-based access control: Admin, Manager, Developer, Client views
Chart.js dashboards: task completion, velocity, deadline burndown
Real-time task status updates with RxJS Subjects
Angular Material UI — responsive across mobile, tablet, desktop
JWT token authentication & route guards for protected views
Angular 16 TypeScript Angular Material RxJS Chart.js JWT REST API
↓ 30% status meetings Role-based access Real-time updates
Other Projects
🚇
⟨/⟩ C/R
Metro Ticket Booking System

Angular CRUD app for metro rail ticket booking with dynamic price calculation, discount engine, and dual edit modes — all driven by Reactive Forms validation. Reduced fare calculation errors to near zero with form validators.

Distance-based fare calculation (km × rate, 10 stations)
Percentage discount toggle with live final price update
Two edit modes: inline table & form-based editing
Angular 15 Reactive Forms TypeScript FormBuilder
🔄
⟨/⟩
Student Management — NgRx Store

Angular application demonstrating production-ready NgRx state management with actions, reducers, selectors, and effects. A reference-quality example of centralized, immutable global state in Angular.

NgRx Store: Actions, Reducers, Selectors, State interface
Immutable state updates with spread operators
Store DevTools integration for state debugging
Angular 15 NgRx RxJS TypeScript
📋
⟨/⟩
Dynamic Column Data Grid

Angular UI component featuring a configurable data grid with per-column show/hide toggles, filter panel, and FontAwesome icons. Demonstrates reusable component architecture and conditional rendering.

10 individually togglable columns via accordion controller
Filter panel with collapse/expand functionality
FontAwesome icon integration throughout

Experience

Work History

Jan 2023 – Oct 2023
Software Engineer Trainee
Sparity Soft Technologies Hyderabad, India Fintech · Loan Management
  • Built secure RESTful APIs using ASP.NET Web API with role-based JWT authentication, powering a loan management platform serving real end users
  • Developed Angular + TypeScript UIs with reactive forms, real-time validation, and responsive layouts for financial product workflows
  • Designed and optimised SQL Server databases using stored procedures, triggers, and indexing — improving query performance by eliminating N+1 patterns
  • Integrated automated EMI deduction pipelines via scheduled jobs and notification services (SMTP)
  • Deployed applications to Azure/AWS/IIS; supported production stability, monitoring, and hotfixes
  • Implemented lazy loading and OnPush change detection strategy for performance optimisation; wrote unit tests across backend services
  • Contributed to API documentation, Postman testing, and code reviews within an Agile/Scrum team of 8 engineers
